tokens.name: clod / SOL

**TIME FRAME:**

* Recent trades: 4 buys in last 5 trades

Considering the stable flow momentum and recent buying pressure, I suggest using a time frame of **2h to 4h**.

Based on these dynamic trading parameters:

**DECISION:** BUY | Limit:-6% | TP:+13% | SL:-11% | Time:3h
